message:
feat(scanner): add rch and codex build artifact patterns for disk reclamation

Add four new artifact patterns to detect large remote-compilation and
codex agent build directories that can consume 70+ GB:
- rch_target_ (prefix, 0.92 confidence)
- .rch_target_ (hidden prefix variant, 0.92 confidence)
- rch-target- (hyphenated variant, 0.92 confidence)
- target_codex (codex agent builds, 0.88 confidence)

Wire corresponding fast-track temp age entries in should_fast_track_temp_age
and add label extraction for aggregated reporting (rch_target_*, target_codex*).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
